danger_signals.visual_form: Distinct enemy sprites with contrasting colors and sharp silhouettes
danger_signals.meaning: Immediate threat to player; collision causes damage

danger_signals.visual_form: Spikes, pits, and environmental obstacles with visual distinctness from safe platforms
danger_signals.meaning: Environmental damage zones; contact results in harm or death

danger_signals.visual_form: Visual drop-off at screen edges or dark void areas
Small moving objects distinct from environment, often glowing or animated

safety_signals.visual_form: Opaque, stable-looking terrain blocks with consistent coloring
safety_signals.meaning: Safe traversal surfaces; no damage on contact

safety_signals.visual_form: Sparkling or distinctly colored objects (gems, items) contrasting from background
safety_signals.meaning: Beneficial resources; safe to approach and collect

safety_signals.visual_form: Glowing or animated special items with clear visual distinction
safety_signals.meaning: Temporary enhancement; safe and beneficial to contact

safety_signals.visual_form: Distinctive landmark or portal (typically end-of-level marker)

faction_indicators.color_identity: Primary character sprite with distinct appearance (red/brown outfit typical of era)
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Player starting position marks safe territory

faction_indicators.color_identity: Alien creature designs with non-humanoid silhouettes
faction_indicators.enemy_visual_variants: Varied enemy types each with distinct sprite designs (hovering creatures, ground-based enemies, etc.)
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Enemy spawning areas; areas with multiple enemy presence indicate hostile zones

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Desert/alien terrain aesthetic with rocky formations, sand, minimal vegetation
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Enemies patrol in predictable patterns; platforming challenges reflect gravity/alien physics

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Screen may flash or show damage/collision effects
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Player knockback animation; enemy aggression increases proximity-based activation

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Clear visual path toward level exit; collectibles guide player through intended routes
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Enemies positioned to create navigational challenges; obstacles create puzzle-like traversal

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Collectibles glow or animate distinctly; power-ups have animated sprites
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Item pickup triggers score/health feedback; visual confirmation of acquisition

environmental_storytelling.example: Mars setting communicated through alien terrain design; progression from surface to potentially interior/ship areas tells story of exploration and rescue

environmental_storytelling.technique: Enemy type variety conveys alien ecosystem
environmental_storytelling.example: Different enemy creatures represent Martian fauna; design variety suggests populated world despite hostile conditions
Items and objects scattered through levels imply previous exploration or activity on Mars
Terrain hazards and platforming challenges suggest harsh Martian environment; jumping mechanics adapted to alien physics

entity_behavioral_tells.behavior: Predictable back-and-forth movement on platforms; visual walking animation indicates non-alert status
Animation change; pursuit or attack behavior initiates when player proximity detected
Hovering flight pattern with gentle up-down movement; indicates continuous threat state
Full animation set; responsive controls; normal movement speed
Knockback animation; potential visual/audio feedback indicating vulnerability
Stationary animation (sparkle/twinkle); unchanged until player contact

notes: Commander Keen: Marooned on Mars uses classic platformer visual language emphasizing immediate danger/safety distinction through sprite design and environmental contrast. Color and animation are primary communication tools for world-state. Limited faction complexity; binary player-vs-environment opposition structure. Minimal political/narrative layering in visual communication—focus is on hazard clarity and navigational readability.
